item_text: this sequence diagram models the insertion process involving a client (main) interacting with a server (api_manager) and a service (service/need/report). the client initiates the process by sending a "new" message to the server, which then converts the data into json format and sends it to the service for processing. upon completion, the service returns a "done" message back to the server, which then communicates the status to the client.
